RDP远程桌面管理: RDP Wrapper 仅支持 Windows 系统
RDP remote desktop management: RDP Wrapper only supports Windows systems

RDP远程桌面管理: 启用远程桌面失败，请以管理员权限运行
RDP remote desktop management: Failed to enable Remote Desktop. Please run as administrator.

RDP远程桌面管理: 禁用远程桌面失败，请以管理员权限运行
RDP remote desktop management: Failed to disable Remote Desktop. Please run as administrator.

RDP远程桌面管理: 用户名和密码不能为空
RDP remote desktop management: Username and password cannot be empty

RDP远程桌面管理: 用户名格式不正确：3-20位，字母开头，仅允许字母数字下划线
RDP remote desktop management: Invalid username format: 3-20 chars, starts with letter, only letters/numbers/underscores

RDP远程桌面管理: 不允许删除系统内置用户：%{user}

RDP remote desktop management: Password for user %{user} has been reset

RDP远程桌面管理: 请在 Windows 设置中启用"允许远程连接"，或点击上方的"启用"按钮自动开启。
RDP remote desktop management: Please enable "Allow remote connections" in Windows Settings, or click the "Enable" button above to turn it on automatically.

RDP远程桌面管理: 手动设置路径：设置 → 系统 → 远程桌面 → 开启"启用远程桌面"开关
RDP remote desktop management: Manual setup path: Settings → System → Remote Desktop → Enable the "Enable Remote Desktop" toggle

RDP远程桌面管理: 暂无远程用户，请点击"添加用户"创建新账户
RDP remote desktop management: No remote users. Please click "Add User" to create a new account.

RDP远程桌面管理: 在当前 Windows 电脑上，确保远程桌面已启用。有两种方式：
RDP remote desktop management: On this Windows PC, make sure Remote Desktop is enabled. Two ways:

RDP远程桌面管理: 方式一：点击上方状态面板中的"启用"按钮（推荐）
RDP remote desktop management: Method 1: Click the "Enable" button in the status panel above (recommended)

RDP远程桌面管理: 设置 → 系统 → 远程桌面 → 开启"启用远程桌面"
RDP remote desktop management: Settings → System → Remote Desktop → Enable "Enable Remote Desktop"

RDP远程桌面管理: 安装 RDP Wrapper（多用户支持）
安装 RDP Wrapper 后，多个用户可同时通过远程桌面连接到本机，互不干扰。
RDP remote desktop management: After installing RDP Wrapper, multiple users can connect via RDP simultaneously without interference.

RDP远程桌面管理: 如果上方状态显示"未安装"，点击"安装"按钮自动安装
RDP remote desktop management: If the status above shows "Not Installed", click the "Install" button to install automatically.

RDP远程桌面管理: 安装需要管理员权限，请确保以管理员身份运行 Weline Server
RDP remote desktop management: Installation requires admin privileges. Please run Weline Server as administrator.

RDP远程桌面管理: 安装后可运行 RDPConf.exe 检查状态
RDP remote desktop management: After installation, run RDPConf.exe to check status

RDP远程桌面管理: 为每个需要远程连接的人创建独立的 Windows 用户账户：
RDP remote desktop management: Create a separate Windows user account for each person who needs remote access:

RDP远程桌面管理: 点击上方"添加用户"按钮创建新用户
RDP remote desktop management: Click the "Add User" button above to create a new user.

RDP远程桌面管理: 每个用户有独立的桌面环境，互不影响
RDP remote desktop management: Each user has an independent desktop environment

RDP远程桌面管理: 建议为不需要安装软件的用户选择"普通用户"权限
RDP remote desktop management: Suggestion: Select "Standard User" permissions for users who do not need to install software

RDP远程桌面管理: 密码要求：至少8位，包含大小写字母和数字
RDP remote desktop management: Password requirements: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase and numbers

RDP远程桌面管理: 其他人如何连接到本机：
RDP remote desktop management: How others can connect to this PC:

RDP远程桌面管理: 按 Win+R，输入 mstsc 回车打开"远程桌面连接"
RDP remote desktop management: Press Win+R, type mstsc, and press Enter to open "Remote Desktop Connection"

RDP远程桌面管理: 输入上方连接地址，点击"连接"
RDP remote desktop management: Enter the connection address above, click "Connect"

RDP远程桌面管理: 输入分配的用户名和密码登录
RDP remote desktop management: Enter the assigned username and password to log in

RDP远程桌面管理: 从 App Store 下载安装 "Microsoft Remote Desktop"
RDP remote desktop management: Download and install "Microsoft Remote Desktop" from the App Store

RDP远程桌面管理: 点击 "Add PC"，输入上方连接地址
RDP remote desktop management: Click "Add PC" and enter the connection address above

RDP远程桌面管理: 添加电脑，输入上方连接地址
RDP remote desktop management: Add PC and enter the connection address above

RDP远程桌面管理: Windows 更新可能导致 RDP Wrapper 失效，需要重新安装或更新配置文件
RDP remote desktop management: Windows updates may cause RDP Wrapper to stop working. Reinstall or update config files.

RDP远程桌面管理: 如果无法连接，请检查防火墙是否放行了 RDP 端口（默认3389）
RDP remote desktop management: If unable to connect, check if the firewall allows RDP port (default 3389)

RDP远程桌面管理: 跨网段连接需要进行端口映射或使用 VPN
RDP remote desktop management: Cross-subnet connections require port forwarding or VPN

RDP远程桌面管理: 同一用户账户不能同时在多处登录，建议为每人创建独立账户
RDP remote desktop management: Same account cannot login from multiple places. Create separate accounts for each person.

RDP远程桌面管理: 多人同时连接会消耗更多系统资源（CPU、内存），请根据硬件配置合理分配用户数
RDP remote desktop management: Multiple connections consume more resources (CPU, RAM). Allocate users based on hardware.
